text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's summer! And summer means beach! And beach means training
camp! Full speed ahead! Off to camp! Go, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer is here, and with it the summer training camp. Our bus sets
out. Its destination: the sparkling seaside.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No duh! This summer is my big chance! ♪ By the time we get back, I'm
gonna be faster than Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll be so strong, she'll be shocked, and shower me with praise, and
pat my head, and oh yeah! You'll be proud of me too, won't you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So once we're there, hit me with the roughest regimen you got! Oh,
but before that... ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Time for a song! 'Scuse me, could you pass the mic? This is number
one Teio, singing her number one song!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Teio dives right in to her summer training with the same
passion that she sang karaoke with.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Bam bam bam bam! Beach dashes are too easy! I could do this all day!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, how's my form? Make sure you're paying attention. I'm
counting on you, all right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
A slope! Mountain trails are always all bumpy and fun! C'mon, let's go,
with a hop, skip, and a jump!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You are coming, aren't you? It's no fun alone. Once we get to the top, we can have a picnic!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, after that run I'm in the mood for fireworks! Look, Trainer, I'm
a spinny firework! Spinny spin spin!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You're supposed to jump up and down! Like this—hup, hah,
whoo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's making the most of training camp, that's for sure. And I'm along
for the entire exhilarating ride...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Morning! Let's keep up the energy today! Whoo! More running
together, and swimming, and...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Trainer? Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I come to, I find myself lying on the cold wooden floor.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer, you're awake. You scared me to death, fainting like that
all of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Like thirty minutes? So training's not over yet! If we pick up the pace,
we can make up for lost time. Today's gonna be fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But why'd you pass out anyway? Not enough sleep?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! You were so excited, you couldn't sleep, and played
games all night? Hehe, I'm kinda guilty of that too...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What's with the silent treatment? Was I spot on? Heh, sleepovers are
always exciting, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But wait a sec... Trainer, I didn't think you were the type to get all
hyper. Yeah, that doesn't seem like you... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Was it my fault you passed out? Because I've been draggin you
around?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's why... I totally forgot you're not an Umamusume. Thanks
for sticking it out...
choice_data_list: No worries. C'mon, we've got training to do...
No worries. C'mon, we've got training to do...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We can't afford to take a day off. Her ambition wouldn't allow it
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just gotta fight through it...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I'll take today off.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Don't "huh" me! I said, I'll take today off, and I mean it! The whole day!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Look how pale you still are—you'll get sick if you move around. So
I've made up my mind. No training today!
choice_data_list: But if you want to catch up to the president...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nngh... Well, we might fall a bit behind on that goal, but that's okay!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Without you tagging along, there's no one to train me anyway. Plus,
it... just wouldn't be like me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I dunno exactly what, but something about it just doesn't feel right.
Prez would probably go off on her own no problem...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But I'd rather go with company. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the summer heat and the buzzing of the cicadas, Teio voices
her honest thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What I really want is to have fun. Just winning isn't enough—I want to
win in style, with pride, and be praised for it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Just like when I got a perfect score on that dance game. I want to
share the moment. With my friends, and you. Plus...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, who knows what kind of trouble I'll run into down the road. I
mean, I'm pretty invincible, but there are hurdles even I can't get over
alone.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Like, remember when I lifted way too much weight, and you stepped
in to help? Just like that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez might be fine all by herself, but I think being with other people is what makes me me, if that makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Which is all to say, I can't do this without you. I'd fail so fast. So, um...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Let's take it easy today, yeah? Ahem. Maybe you should pace
yourself a little, Trainer.
choice_data_list: My own words used against me...
My own words used against me...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you remembered. Well, that's payback! ♪ Thanks to you, I
learned not to push myself too hard, so now it's your turn!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh! How about I give you a massage this time?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Here goes! Tickle tickle tickle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, we forget all about training and simply have fun. And
once the moment has passed...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, since we're taking today off, I have an idea...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wanna check out tonight's festival? I bet it'll be tons of fun. Right?
Right?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay! It's decided then! All right, let's play and eat the night away!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, everything's so bright and sparkly! Hey hey, Trainer! Let's buy
some masks and try them on! Which one do you want?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Two masks, please! I'll take the pink Hangout Ranger mask!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her cheerful voice seems to rise above the clamor. Running, playing,
laughing—Teio dashes through her summer training camp in style.
